patch.value: GH-591: pm context agenda events re-embed full item payloads already listed in the same response (~35% of brief output)

GitHub issue #591: every agenda.events[] entry embeds item_title/type/status/priority/assignee/deadline/tags for items already fully present in high_level/low_level of the same envelope — measured 2032 of 5794 bytes (~35%) of a 28-item brief context, all duplicates except at/date/kind. Fix = reference-only agenda rows (item_id + at/date/kind) when the item appears elsewhere in the same response, full embed only for items not otherwise included; token-efficiency directive core.

Agenda events for items already listed in the same context response carry references only (no duplicated title/type/status/priority/assignee/tags); items not otherwise present keep enough inline fields to act on; byte-measurement recorded before/after; TOON + JSON parity; regression coverage
